## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read and agree to follow the Contributor Covenant in [`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
- [ ] If I used AI assistance, I reviewed the result end to end, understand it, and can explain and maintain every change. Please do not submit opaque generated code.
- [ ] I checked whether this belongs in core. If it can be a plugin, utility, or separate package for a narrower audience, that is usually the better fit.
- [ ] If this PR changes core, it is a good candidate because it solves a common need, fits the existing API, keeps surface area and bundle cost low, and does not require breaking changes.
- [ ] I added or updated docs and tests where needed.

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know about tradeoffs, open questions, or follow-up work.
